div.p: Architecture: x86-32 (Protected Mode) Performance Targets: 500-1500 cycles (~0.5-1.5 μs @ 1.0 GHz) OS Kernel: Preemptive Monolithic (e.g., Linux 2.4 style) Frame Size: 68 Bytes Total (Interrupt + GPRs + Segments)

ul.li: Seg Frame: 16 bytes (ds, es, fs, gs)
pushad: (EAX, ECX, EDX, EBX, ESP, EBP, ESI, EDI)

li.code: mov ds, eax; mov es, eax

ul.li: clts (Clear Task Switched bit in CR0)

p.em: Note: TLB Flush accounts for >50% of cost
